message:
fix(font): add clippy lint suppressions and safety documentation

Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)] to shape(), shape_impl(),
do_shape(), paint_linear_gradient(), paint_radial_gradient(), and the
FontShaper::shape trait method — these functions have inherently complex
signatures due to font rendering parameters.

Add /// # Safety doc comment to ColorLine::new_from_hb explaining the
raw pointer ownership transfer contract.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -84,6 +84,7 @@ pub enum DrawOp {
     ClosePath,
 }
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
 pub fn paint_linear_gradient(
     context: &Context,
     x0: f64,
@@ -123,6 +124,7 @@ pub fn paint_linear_gradient(
     Ok(())
 }
 
+#[allow(clippy::too_many_arguments)]
 pub fn paint_radial_gradient(
     context: &Context,
     x0: f64,
